nodes.name: Webhook: Clay Enrichment Complete
nodes.notes: Receives enriched account data from Clay after waterfall enrichment completes. Payload includes firmographics, technographics, contacts, and pain indicators.

nodes.name: ICP Scoring Engine
nodes.notes: Composite scoring model (0-100): Org Size (20), Specialty Match (15), EHR Vendor (10), Pain Signals (25), Intent Recency (20), Geographic Fit (10). Routes to HOT/WARM/COOL/COLD tiers.

nodes.name: Route by Tier
nodes.notes: 4-way routing: HOT → Priority SDR queue + immediate sequence | WARM → 14-day nurture | COOL → Monthly drip | COLD → Archive

nodes.name: Smartlead: Priority Sequence (HOT)
nodes.notes: Enrolls HOT leads (score 80+) into high-priority multi-step email campaign. Custom fields enable AI personalization via Smartlead's variable system.

nodes.name: Slack: HOT Lead Alert
nodes.notes: Immediate Slack alert for founder/SDR when a high-score lead enters the pipeline

nodes.name: HubSpot: Create Contact (WARM)
nodes.notes: Creates contact in HubSpot with ICP metadata for WARM leads. Enrolls in 14-day nurture workflow via HubSpot automation.

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Archive (COOL/COLD)
nodes.notes: Low-score leads logged to Google Sheets for monthly review. Re-evaluated if new signals fire.
